title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 22.  SCRAP METAL RECYCLERS

§1961.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Scrap Metal Recyclers Law".

Acts 2012, No. 827, §1, eff. June 14, 2012.

CHAPTER 22.  SCRAP METAL RECYCLERS
§1961.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Scrap Metal Recyclers Law".
Acts 2012, No. 827, §1, eff. June 14, 2012.
